stt.micAccessError: Ga e kgone go bona maekerofouno. Tlhola ditetlelelo.

error.passwordRequired: Nomoro ya sephiri e a tlhokega mo faeleng ya .ania e e tsenngwang khoutu

greetings.0: Dumela! Nka go thusa jang gompieno?
greetings.1: Dumelang! Amogelesega! Nka go direla eng?
greetings.2: Dumelang! Ke itumelela go bua le wena!
greetings.3: Dumelang! Ke fano go thusa. O tlhoka eng?
greetings.4: Dumelang! Le kae? Nka nna mosola jang?
